posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
Did you know that monday sales CRM had an impressive year this year with 25k of customers jumping on board but you might still be asking yourself how is monday sales CRM different from your standard monday.com board?

It starts with centralized communications, mass emailing, deal funnel dashboards, team performance, completely customizable from pre to post sales and…well, a lot more!

And so, who better to host our next community hour than our very own Head of monday sales CRM GTM, Ron Kimhi!

Join us later today as Ron discusses the differences between work management and sales CRM and more.

Coming? Let me know below and feel free to drop any questions too

Community hour - Work management vs. sales CRM (6)1620×1620 363 KB
